requests.reason: Own the single dependency-leaf interaction identity module and have W6 and W7 consume it without duplicate declarations or a runtime context cycle.

W6 must adopt and re-export the shared interaction-reference IDs, then import EventId from that leaf and add the exact routeProjected root, Event-to-routeReserved, and routeProjected-to-delivery audit admissions without W7 patching invocations.
Append exact typed audit evidence and admit the routed PreparedInvocation under the reservation's stable InvocationId in the target Actor transaction.
Compose W7 two-phase preparation and target admission with exact-caller dispatcher evidence while preserving duplicate-before-mutable-gates ordering.
Implement the private JsonPatchEngine adapter with detached RFC 6902 validation and application; W7 keeps patch semantics behind the typed port.
W0 must aggregate the W7 SQLite event adapter through the internal substrate composition without requiring W7 to edit src/substrates/index.ts or expose it publicly.
Assign the dependency-leaf interaction references and W7 SQLite event contract tests exclusively to W7 in the shared ownership map.
Add the W7 verified storage seam ID and events-routing fragment to the shared seam denominator.
W0 must aggregate artifacts/records/events-routing.json into the canonical and transitional legacy record registry so W7 codecs are classified without W7 editing ownership-map or registry scripts.
Move W7 requirements from the seed into its owned conformance fragment before final ledger aggregation.
